name: halftone-dissolve
title: Halftone Dissolve
description: Scene A dissolves into scene B through a growing halftone dot field: accent ink dots pop onto a fixed grid smallest-first, each opens into a window onto B, until the windows merge and B fully replaces A.
evidence: Wave L L6: the halftone texture transition from the frame study, a seeded threshold map ordered by a direction enum

variables.label: Dot size
variables.description: Grid pitch for the halftone field.

variables.label: Direction
variables.description: Threshold ordering: ltr sweeps left to right, center grows from the middle, noise scatters.

variables.label: Dissolve at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start when the dissolve begins.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Ink dot color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the frame leaves. None holds scene B.
